ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To Apr-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Atty. Steven B. Mains appeared for plaintiff Fremont Bank.
Patrick O' Brien, was placed under oath and examined on behalf of the plaintiff.
No appearance by defendants Christopher Harmon, Boeger Thomas Multimedia, a corporation and Maggie A. F. Harmon.
Default was entered against defendants on June 2, 2009 and Sept. 28, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Fremont Bank against the Defaulted Defendants Christopher Harmon and against BOEGER THOMAS MULTIMEDIA, a California corporation and Christopher J. Harmon and Maggie A. F. Harmon, as trustees of the Christopher J. and Maggie A.F. Harmon Family Trust as follows:
Damages/Principal - $ 73,641.28
Prejudgment Interest - $ 9,871.46
Late charges of $50.03
for a total judgment in the amount of $ 83,562.77

Moving party to prepare form of judgment.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FREMONT BANK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER J. HARMON AND DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER J. HARMON AND MAGGIE A.F. HARMON, AS TRUSTEES OF THE CHRISTOPHER J. AND MAGGIE A.F. HARMON FAMILY TRUST ON THE COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment granted as to Christopher Harmon individually, but denied without prejudice for attorney fees. Motion for summary judgment denied as to defendants Christopher and Maggie Harmon as Trustee, Boeger Thomas Multimedia, Boeger and Thomas against whom defaults have been entered. Default judgments are set in Department 218, not the Law and motion departments. Request for attorney fees may be made by noticed motion in Department 302. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
